content.content:
DRY_RUN=false

run_cmd() {
  if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == true ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$*"
  else
    eval "$@"
  fi
}

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case "$1" in
    --dry-run)
      DRY_RUN=true
      shift
      ;;
    *)
      echo "Unknown argument: $1" >&2
      exit 1
      ;;
  esac
done

if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == true ]]; then
  warn "Dry-run mode enabled: commands will be printed only"
fi

log "Checking git status"
run_cmd 'git status --porcelain | grep -q . && exit 1'

log "Checking current branch"
run_cmd 'CURRENT_BRANCH="$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)"'
run_cmd '[[ "${CURRENT_BRANCH}" != "${BRANCH}" ]] && exit 1'

log "Verifying SSH connectivity"
run_cmd 'ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_HOST}" "echo connected"'

log "Installing dependencies"
run_cmd 'npm ci'

log "Running build"
run_cmd 'npm run build'

log "Creating tarball"
run_cmd 'tar -czf "${LOCAL_ARTIFACT_PATH}" "${BUILD_DIR}" package.json package-lock.json'

log "Preparing remote directories"
run_cmd 'ssh "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_HOST}" "set -e; mkdir -p '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}'\'' '\''${REMOTE_SHARED_DIR}'\''"'

log "Uploading artifact"
run_cmd 'scp "${LOCAL_ARTIFACT_PATH}" "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_HOST}:${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}"'

log "Deploying on remote server"
run_cmd 'ssh "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_HOST}" "set -euo pipefail; RELEASE_NAME=\$(basename '\''${ARTIFACT_NAME}'\'' .tar.gz); RELEASE_DIR='\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/'\''\${RELEASE_NAME}; mkdir -p \"\$RELEASE_DIR\"; tar -xzf '\''${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}'\'' -C \"\$RELEASE_DIR\"; rm -f '\''${REMOTE_ARTIFACT_PATH}'\''; cd \"\$RELEASE_DIR\"; npm ci --omit=dev; cat > .env <<'"'"'EOF'"'"'; NODE_ENV=production; PORT=3000; LOG_LEVEL=info; EOF; if [ -f '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\'' ]; then cp '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\'' '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/previous_release'\''; fi; echo \"\$RELEASE_NAME\" > '\''${REMOTE_RELEASES_DIR}/current_release'\''; if [ -f migrations.sh ]; then chmod +x migrations.sh; ./migrations.sh; elif npm run | grep -q '\''migrate'\''; then npm run migrate; fi; ln -sfn \"\$RELEASE_DIR\" '\''${REMOTE_CURRENT_LINK}'\''; pm2 restart '\''${PM2_APP_NAME}'\'' --update-env || pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --only '\''${PM2_APP_NAME}'\'' --update-env; pm2 save"'

log "Waiting for service to stabilize"
run_cmd 'sleep 5'

log "Checking health endpoint"
run_cmd 'curl -fsS --max-time 10 "${HEALTHCHECK_URL}" >/dev/null'

log "Showing recent logs"
run_cmd 'ssh "${SERVER_USER}@${SERVER_HOST}" "pm2 logs '\''${PM2_APP_NAME}'\'' --lines 50 --nostream"'
